GeneralDescription.SourceString: Street warrior, sushi chef, and the coolest lizard in the Peace Syndicate.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: [[SECURE PEACE SYNDICATE MESSAGE INTERCEPTED]] You're our most-trusted lieutenant, Thunder. Keep an eye on Evie, protect the city, and Keep the Peace.- X
